name: Parallel World Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>平行世界融合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>パラレル・ワールド・フュージョン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 "Elemental HERO" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling your banished Fusion Materials listed on it into your Deck. You cannot Special Summon monsters except by this card's effect, during the turn you activate this card.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 "Elemental HERO" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling your banished Fusion Materials listed on it into your Deck. You cannot Special Summon monsters except by this card's effect, during the turn you activate this card.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
Uses the player's banished cards as Fusion Materials
Returns Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon to Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
